titleJa: multi-agent 設計は、概念図ではなく運用モデルとして扱われ始める
titleEn: Multi-agent design is starting to be treated as an operating model, not just a concept diagram
summaryJa: 2025年6月時点では、Foundry Agent Service GA、Developer Essentials、OpenAI Responses API の更新、Semantic Kernel の orchestration 発表が重なり、multi-agent をどう分担・評価・監査するかが現実の設計課題になっていた。
summaryEn: By June 2025, the combination of Azure AI Foundry Agent Service GA, Developer Essentials, OpenAI's Responses API updates, and Semantic Kernel orchestration announcements turned multi-agent design into a concrete question of responsibility, evaluation, and auditability.

publishedSources.label: tau-bench: A Benchmark for Tool-Agent-User Interaction in Real-World Domains
Magentic-One: A Generalist Multi-Agent System for Solving Complex Tasks
